posts.text:
Deport this Cenk Slob


Meghan McCain (@MeghanMcCain)

I was a cohost on the view for 4 years and this is the most unhinged, insane segment of political media I have ever seen in my entire life. 

Our friend @benfergusonshow is too good for this batshit insanity.



— https://nitter.net/MeghanMcCain/status/2034457010004017542#m

Thankfully you deported yourself.


Glenn Greenwald (@ggreenwald)

There are numerous people who were very popular in MAGA now being expelled: Tucker, MTG, Megyn Kelly, Massie, Joe Kent, etc.

They all have one thing -- and only one thing -- in common:

They are critics of Israel. But that's the supreme issue for Mark Levin's movement (MAGA).🇮🇱



— https://nitter.net/ggreenwald/status/2034349259802161409#m

Qatarlson and Kent a big hit on Iranian Nazi regime TV!  Giving aid and comfort to the enemy.


Josh Hammer (@josh_hammer)

This account is literally Iranian regime-owned and operated propaganda.

It's been tweeting out clips of Joe Kent on Tucker Carlson all evening.

Do you see what is happening yet?



— https://nitter.net/josh_hammer/status/2034444857096216846#m

Says the Boy from Brazil.  Why so upset?  Your little world of freaks snd frauds crumbling?  Laura is a patriot.


Glenn Greenwald (@ggreenwald)

Look at this rotted, vindictive witch trying to get someone fired from his job in the American government because his father publicly criticizes the foreign country to which she is loyal.

Punishing someone for their parents' political views isn't a part of American culture:



— https://nitter.net/ggreenwald/status/2034386756263371214#m

Do tell


Daily Mail US (@Daily_MailUS)

Lunatic Megyn Kelly is FINALLY ruined! Her appalling X-rated smear of my friend proves it... but now I know her truly disturbing plan: JOSH HAMMER trib.al/P6ab1rd




— https://nitter.net/Daily_MailUS/status/2034315554593353783#m

You’re good


Eyal Yakoby (@EYakoby)

Joe Kent resigns and within an hour, he is booked on Tucker Carlson’s show.

As soon as the show drops, hundreds of accounts all at once post the same clip with the same messaging.

None of this is organic.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/EYakoby/status/2034412642597576880#m

I assume you worked in the fruit section of the food store.


Ian Carroll (@IanCarrollShow)

Joe Kent is an American HERO and the Israel Lobby is about to be in full overdrive to destroy him by whatever means necessary.



— https://nitter.net/IanCarrollShow/status/2034417646767079715#m

What did Tucker Carlson know and when did he know it?  Hey, Tuck, can we see those texts with the Iranian regime.  This could be one of the great scandals in history.  Texting with the enemy.  And who gave you a heads up that our government had seen them?  Just asking questions, POS.


Rudy W. Giuliani (@RudyGiuliani)

🚨BREAKING NEWS: Joe Kent is under FBI investigation for allegedly leaking classified information, three sources tell @ShelbyTalcott of @Semafor. The investigation reportedly pre-d

Sounds right


Dan Freemont 🇺🇸 (@TheeDanFreeman)

Here’s my take. 

Joe Kent leaked classified info to the Supreme Commander of the Woke Reich, Tucker Carlson. 

FBI initiates an investigation and Kent gets wind of it.

Kent knows he will be fired soon and confers with the Supreme Commander and together they draft the resignation letter and plan for a big interview for their prime audience; the Muslim Brotherhood and anti-Zionists. 

Ayatollah Carlson then hooks Kent up with Carrie Hezboller to

Well said


Sebastian Gorka DrG (@SebGorka)

The scum that is @FmrRepMTG



— https://nitter.net/SebGorka/status/2034397839795585425#m

I predicted this kind of BS from the know nothings. The left will burp the same garbage.


Raheem J. Kassam (@RaheemKassam)

They never pursued any prior leakers in this manner. Not even the Obama holdovers, or “anonymous,” or Vindmans.

This isn’t about classified intel. It’s about making an example of someone who dared to have a different opinion.



— https://nitter.net/RaheemKassam/status/2034420880239964403#m

You guys keep quoting Joe Kent.  For you, the ends justify the means.  Continue making partisan fools of yourselves.  Continue promoting nutjob and antisemite Carlson.  Whatever gets you your clicks and pays the bills.  
mediaite.com/media/news/trum…

No wonder Joe Kent didn’t get back to us to come on my radio show.  I would have forced this information out of him anyway.
Community note: Joe Kent publicly replied to Mark Levin's invitation to appear on his radio show, stating "Sure. Let’s go." x.com/marklevinshow/… x.com/joekent16jan19…


Mark R. Levin (@marklevinshow)

BREAKING NEWS
semafor.com/article/03/18/20…




— https://nitter.net/marklevinshow/status/2034427445311385837#m

Well said


David M Friedman (@DavidM_Friedman)

And without the $22.8 billion one day you or your kids could put your head between your legs in response to a nuclear alert and kiss your ass goodbye!



— https://nitter.net/DavidM_Friedman/status/2034231025476206802#m

The whole gaggle of MAGA hating bigots, just a matter of time


Candace Owens (@RealCandaceO)

You are girl-mathing it. 
Viewership decreased because we took 10 days off air to prepare for our Erika Kirk series. 
Find the nearest male to explain to you things like total volume output vs episode average, etc and how these things are calculated. 
Men can help.



— https://nitter.net/RealCandaceO/status/2034254017820328362#m

Ratcliffe vs. Kent

Kent was left out of classified discussions. Why?

instagram.com/reel/DWCI5CBDS…

Don’t upset dramatic resignation, please.


Wasson Watch Co. (@WassonWatch)

You can't make this up.





— https://nitter.net/WassonWatch/status/2034320274762375596#m
